description: Fragment from the top of a large ketubba with an ornate heading of geometrical designs, blessings for the Nagid David I Maimonides (r. 1237–1300 CE), and it seems a band of faded Arabic script. A partial date is preserved, 15[..] Seleucid.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בAramaic, Hebrew מהמאה ה-13. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
